name: Divakar R. Upadhyay
title: Sr. Software Engineer
bio: I'm a Sr. Software Engineer with 8+ years in Microsoft .NET, specialising in scalable enterprise applications, third-party integrations, and full-stack web development. I've delivered production systems for clients from global corporates like Acer Group to health-tech startups and diamond industry platforms.
My stack spans C# .NET, AngularJS, MSSQL, microservices and RESTful APIs — with a track record of complex integrations including EDI logistics, payment gateways, and healthcare APIs.
